use_cases: Add animated visual interest to landing pages and hero sections
Create immersive backgrounds for marketing and product pages
Enhance brand presentation with dynamic flowing graphics
Provide decorative animated backgrounds for cards and UI containers
Serve as a visually engaging loading or waiting state background
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based animated background component that renders flowing, morphing grid patterns with a tech-inspired aesthetic. Features smooth time-based animation with customizable colors, line widths, and grid frequencies. Ideal for adding dynamic visual depth to landing pages, hero sections, and marketing sites with a modern developer-focused feel.
